'''zhotangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iliopelvic|iliopelvic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iliopelvic|iliopelvic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhotangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhotangithi|zhotangithi]] || [[word:zhotangiji|zhotangiji]] || [[word:zhotangishi|zhotangishi]] || [[word:zhotangiki|zhotangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhotanguthuthu|zhotanguthuthu]] || [[word:zhotangujuju|zhotangujuju]] || [[word:zhotangushushu|zhotangushushu]] || [[word:zhotangukuku|zhotangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhotanguthu|zhotanguthu]] || [[word:zhotanguju|zhotanguju]] || [[word:zhotangushu|zhotangushu]] || [[word:zhotanguku|zhotanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhotangufthuf|zhotangufthuf]] || [[word:zhotangufjuf|zhotangufjuf]] || [[word:zhotangufshuf|zhotangufshuf]] || [[word:zhotangufkuf|zhotangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhotangethe|zhotangethe]] || [[word:zhotangeje|zhotangeje]] || [[word:zhotangeshe|zhotangeshe]] || [[word:zhotangeke|zhotangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhotangothotho|zhotangothotho]] || [[word:zhotangojojo|zhotangojojo]] || [[word:zhotangoshosho|zhotangoshosho]] || [[word:zhotangokoko|zhotangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhotangotho|zhotangotho]] || [[word:zhotangojo|zhotangojo]] || [[word:zhotangosho|zhotangosho]] || [[word:zhotangoko|zhotangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhotangofthof|zhotangofthof]] || [[word:zhotangofjof|zhotangofjof]] || [[word:zhotangofshof|zhotangofshof]] || [[word:zhotangofkof|zhotangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfthĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfjĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfshĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfkĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfthĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfjĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfshĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfkĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfthĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfjĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfshĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotangĂŻfkĂŻf|zhotangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhotangĂŠthĂŠ|zhotangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhotangĂŠjĂŠ|zhotangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhotangĂŠshĂŠ|zhotangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhotangĂŠkĂŠ|zhotangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhotangathatha|zhotangathatha]] || [[word:zhotangajaja|zhotangajaja]] || [[word:zhotangashasha|zhotangashasha]] || [[word:zhotangakaka|zhotangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhotangatha|zhotangatha]] || [[word:zhotangaja|zhotangaja]] || [[word:zhotangasha|zhotangasha]] || [[word:zhotangaka|zhotangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhotangafthaf|zhotangafthaf]] || [[word:zhotangafjaf|zhotangafjaf]] || [[word:zhotangafshaf|zhotangafshaf]] || [[word:zhotangafkaf|zhotangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhotangasha|zhotangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhotangshĂ«asha|zhotangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhotangroasha|zhotangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhotangmuasha|zhotangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhotangyaasha|zhotangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhotangnkshĂ«asha|gozhotangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhotangnkroasha|gozhotangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhotangnkmuasha|gozhotangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhotangnkyaasha|gozhotangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhotatangasha|zhotatangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhotatangshĂ«asha|zhotatangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhotatangroasha|zhotatangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhotatangmuasha|zhotatangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhotatangyaasha|zhotatangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhotatangnkshĂ«asha|gozhotatangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhotatangnkroasha|gozhotatangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhotatangnkmuasha|gozhotatangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhotatangnkyaasha|gozhotatangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhetĂŠngasha|zhetĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhetĂŠngshĂ«asha|zhetĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhetĂŠngroasha|zhetĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhetĂŠngmuasha|zhetĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhetĂŠngyaasha|zhetĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhetĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|gozhetĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhetĂŠngnkroasha|gozhetĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhetĂŠngnkmuasha|gozhetĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhetĂŠngnkyaasha|gozhetĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhotfangasha|zhotfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhotfangshĂ«asha|zhotfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhotfangroasha|zhotfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhotfangmuasha|zhotfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhotfangyaasha|zhotfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhotfangnkshĂ«asha|gozhotfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhotfangnkroasha|gozhotfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhotfangnkmuasha|gozhotfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhotfangnkyaasha|gozhotfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
